items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is included among the 10 Dividend Stocks With Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential. On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham sai

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced, said Jerome Pecresse, head of Rio Tinto's aluminum and lithium business unit. Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, also noted that de

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB), a global lithium producer, from High Risk to Buy. The target price remains at $225. Citi stated that the market is underestimating Albemarle's growth potential despite recent weakness in spot lithium prices.

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand to witness a CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Stationary storage is expected to be a significant driver for lithium demand along with EVs. Albemarle expects demand to grow roughly 15-40% this year. Demand indicators stayed positive in Q1 2026, with glo

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. RBC reiterated its outperform rating and boosted price target
